headline: Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) Stock Could Be 3.89% Below Fair Value
summary: Expeditors International of Washington (EXPD) has drawn investor attention after recent trading left the stock at a last close of US$164.02, prompting a closer look at its returns and underlying logistics business. See our latest analysis for Expeditors International of Washington. At a share price of US$164.02, Expeditors International of Washington reflects steady positive momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 5.51% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 45.62%.
